rows.question_en: Is your Facebook page profile image a clear professional headshot with consistent branding colors?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ کے فیس بک پیج کی پروفائل تصویر واضح پروفیشنل ہیڈ شاٹ ہے اور برانڈنگ کلرز سے میچ کرتی ہے؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Use a high-resolution portrait with good lighting. | Wear classroom-appropriate attire to reflect your teaching identity. | Apply one consistent color tone that matches your page visuals.
rows.tips: Avoid logos-only photos. People trust educator brands that show a real face.
rows.related_tool_placeholder: Tool idea: Canva profile photo frame + basic color filter.

rows.question_en: Does your cover photo clearly communicate your teaching niche and student outcome?
rows.question_ur: کیا کور فوٹو سے آپ کی ٹیچنگ نِچ اور طلبہ کے نتائج واضح طور پر سمجھ آتے ہیں؟
rows.suggestion_title_ur: پیغام پر مبنی کور تیار کریں
rows.suggestion_steps: Add one short value statement (who you teach + what result). | Include your core subject and class level. | Keep text readable on mobile preview.
rows.tips: A clear promise in the cover area improves first impressions in seconds.

rows.question_en: Is your intro/bio written in student-focused language instead of generic teacher statements?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ کا انٹرو/بایو عام جملوں کے بجائے طالب علم کی ضرورت کے مطابق لکھا گیا ہے؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Start with the audience you serve. | Mention one measurable learning result. | End with a friendly call to action such as message for guidance.
rows.tips: Use simple language parents and students can understand immediately.

rows.question_en: Do you have a fixed weekly content plan (tips, live class snippets, success stories, FAQs)?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ کے پاس ہفتہ وار فکسڈ کنٹینٹ پلان موجود ہے (ٹپس، لائیو کلپس، کامیابی کہانیاں، FAQ)؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Create 4 content pillars and assign one day to each. | Batch-create post ideas every weekend. | Track engagement and repeat top-performing formats.
rows.tips: Consistency beats perfection for personal brand growth.

rows.question_en: Are your posts using simple hooks in the first 2 lines to stop scrolling?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ کی پوسٹس کی پہلی دو لائنیں مضبوط ہُک رکھتی ہیں تاکہ لوگ اسکرول روکیں؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Open with a student problem question. | Add a bold promise or number-based result. | Keep first line under 8 words where possible.
rows.tips: Strong hooks increase reach even without paid ads.
rows.related_tool_placeholder: Tool idea: Hook swipe file for educators.

rows.question_en: Do you showcase social proof like student testimonials, grades, or parent feedback regularly?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ باقاعدگی سے سوشل پروف دکھاتے ہیں جیسے ٹیسٹی مونیلز، گریڈز یا والدین کا فیڈبیک؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Post one proof-based story each week. | Blur sensitive student data before sharing. | Add context: what strategy produced the result.
rows.tips: Specific proof converts better than generic praise.

rows.question_en: Is your page CTA button aligned with your goal (Message, WhatsApp, Book Now, Learn More)?
rows.question_ur: کیا پیج کا CTA بٹن آپ کے اصل مقصد کے مطابق ہے (Message، WhatsApp، Book Now، Learn More)؟
rows.suggestion_title_ur: CTA کو مقصد کے ساتھ ہم آہنگ کریں
rows.suggestion_steps: Set one primary action for new visitors. | Match button text with the offer in your pinned post. | Test CTA response weekly and refine.
rows.tips: One clear CTA avoids confusion and improves inquiries.

rows.question_en: Have you pinned a high-converting post that introduces your teaching offer and contact process?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ نے ایک ہائی کنورٹنگ پن پوسٹ لگائی ہے جس میں آپ کی آفر اور رابطہ طریقہ واضح ہو؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Explain who the program is for. | Add key benefits in bullet points. | Include exact next step: message keyword or booking link.
rows.tips: Pinned posts act as your landing page on Facebook.
rows.related_tool_placeholder: Tool idea: Pinned post conversion copy template.

rows.question_en: Do you respond to comments and inbox messages within 24 hours with a professional script?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ 24 گھنٹوں کے اندر کمنٹس اور ان باکس میسجز کا پروفیشنل اسکرپٹ کے ساتھ جواب دیتے ہیں؟
rows.suggestion_steps: Prepare 3 quick-reply scripts for common questions. | Use polite greetings and name personalization. | End replies with one clear next action.
rows.tips: Fast response time increases trust and enrollment chances.
rows.related_tool_placeholder: Tool idea: Saved replies in Meta Business Suite.

rows.question_en: Are you reviewing Facebook Insights monthly to improve content, timing, and audience targeting?
rows.question_ur: کیا آپ ماہانہ Facebook Insights دیکھ کر کنٹینٹ، ٹائمنگ اور آڈینس ٹارگٹنگ بہتر کرتے ہیں؟
rows.suggestion_title_ur: Insights سے مسلسل گروتھ حاصل کریں
rows.suggestion_steps: Track top 5 posts by reach and saves. | Identify best posting time from engagement trends. | Drop low-performing formats and double down on winners.
rows.tips: Data-led improvement is the fastest path to a stronger educator brand.
